Birth date range analysis: dob_max=1974-12-31 yields age 51 on 2026-03-08 (current date from CLAUDE.md). The metadata claims ages 50-74 but the corresponding birth dates (1950-01-01 to 1974-12-31) actually yield ages 51-76 in 2026.

Birth date range analysis: dob_min=1950-01-01 yields age 76 on 2026-03-08 (current date from CLAUDE.md). The metadata claims ages 50-74 but the corresponding birth dates actually yield ages 51-76 in 2026.

privileged_info_summary: The screening recall campaign task extracts female patients aged 50-74 from the MedinTux database. The CSV output should be stored at /home/ga/Documents/screening_recall_list.csv with headers: nom, prenom, date_naissance, adresse, code_postal, ville, telephone, contact_complet. A summary text file should be generated at /home/ga/Documents/screening_recall_summary.txt. Patients are filtered by sex=F and birth dates between 1950-01-01 and 1974-12-31 inclusive. The contact_complet column is 'OUI' if address, postal code, and city are all present, otherwise 'NON'. NOTE: There is an inconsistency in the metadata - the age range (50-74) does not match the birth date range (1950-01-01 to 1974-12-31) which corresponds to ages 51-76 in 2026. The actual implementation uses the birth date range, not age-based filtering.
